message:
fix(dns/cache): apply TTL clamping to negative cache entries

Apply clamp_ttl() to negative_ttl before storing NegativeNoRecords entries,
matching the behavior already used for positive entries. Without clamping,
a negative TTL from config could exceed the configured max_ttl or fall
below min_ttl, creating inconsistent cache expiry behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
